title: Mabugat kan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Mabugat kan''' was a creature used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A variant of the [[dovin basal]]s that the Yuuzhan Vong used to pull their craft through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] as well as for shielding, it was developed by [[Qelah Kwaad]] and based on research by [[Nen Yim]]. The mabugat kan was designed to consume [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relays]] by tracing the HoloNet signals to their source and generating a singularity. [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] made quick use of them after the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9, hoping to freeze the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] by preventing them from communicating with each other and [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
